Private/Seed Pools

Private and seed pools are very exclusive pools that give you early access to projects as an investor at private or seed stage. These are one of the first sale rounds and usually offer a lower price per token than the following public IDO round(s). All projects listed here are subjected to our high-quality standards and are personally vetted by our team for investor safety.

Upcoming & Open Pools

There are currently no upcoming pools.
